questions.question: Who does John praise for his hospitality to traveling missionaries?
questions.feedback: John praises Gaius for showing hospitality to traveling brothers.

questions.question: Who does John criticize for loving to be first and refusing to welcome the brothers?
questions.feedback: Diotrephes loves to be first and refuses to welcome the brothers.

questions.question: John says Demetrius is well spoken of by everyone.
questions.feedback: Demetrius is well spoken of by everyone and by the truth itself.

questions.question: John says he has no greater joy than to hear that his children are walking in the _____.
questions.feedback: No greater joy than to hear that my children are walking in the truth.

questions.question: Dear friend, do not imitate what is evil but what is _____.
questions.feedback: Do not imitate evil but imitate good.
